TextENGNew: The next morning... Rena wasn't at our usual meeting spot.
At first glance, a trivial, insignificant occurrence.
But a thought came to me.
The gears had begun to turn...
Rena's voice echoed in my ears, though she was nowhere to be found.
I'm going to kill Teppei... I'm going to kill Teppei... Kill... Kill...
Rena's voice, repeating like an echo.
As if guided by those words, I walked to school alone.
Inside the classroom, the usual morning scene unfolded.
Rena was already in her seat, cheerfully chatting with Rika-chan.
``Are you looking forward to tomorrow's festival, Rika-chan?``
``...Mii.@k@vS18/05/160500008. I cannot be as carefree about it as Rena.@k@vS18/05/160500009. There is so much to prepare.``
changeReason: Original translates Rika's catchphrase みぃ as 'Meep'; new translation uses 'Mii' which is the standard romanization used consistently in the Higurashi translation.

TextENGNew: ``Rika-chan is going to look so kyuute in her shrine maiden outfit.@k@vS18/02/160200065. Just imagining it now... hau~, she's too kyuute~!``
Rena stroked Rika-chan's head with a dreamy look in her eyes.
``Mii~.@k@vS18/05/160500011. At this rate, Rena is going to take me home with her...``
changeReason: Original uses 'Meep~' for みぃ; new translation uses the standard 'Mii~' romanization.

TextENGNew: ``Hau~!@k@vS18/02/160200067. Rika-chan, you're pretty sharp~!``
Rena was playfully fawning over Rika-chan, and when she noticed me, she greeted me with a smile and a cheery 'good morning.'
I couldn't read anything from Rena's expression. She wore nothing but a pasted-on smile.
Suddenly, someone slapped me hard on the back. I turned to find Mion standing there.
``Morning, Kei-chan.``
``Morning.@k@vS18/01/160100195. ...Hey, about that...``
Mion slipped into her seat as if to cut off what I was about to say, then pressed her palms together with a 'Sorry!'
``What was that about, all of a sudden?@k@vS18/01/160100197. Did you do something to me?``
``...Kei-chan, you really didn't notice?``
Mion leaned in to peer at my face.
``Even if you say that...@k@vS18/01/160100199. I honestly have no idea...``
As she murmured that, Mion's expression clouded over for just an instant. But it quickly brightened again.
``Well then, I'll just keep it a secret~``
``Come on, you can't build it up like that and then drop it.@k@vS18/01/160100201. What is it?@k@vS18/01/160100202. Tell me.``
``...It's not a big deal, really.@k@vS18/03/160300055. You know how I was late to our meeting spot this morning?``
``...Y-yeah.@k@vS18/01/160100204. Now that you mention it, you're right...``
I hadn't given it a second thought until Mion brought it up.
I'd been so preoccupied with Rena that I hadn't even noticed Mion's absence at the meeting place.
``Sorry, sorry.@k@vS18/03/160300057. I was kind of dragging my feet before leaving the house.@k@vS18/03/160300058. It's really no big deal.``
``I'm such a klutz, honestly.@k@vS18/03/160300060. I didn't notice until after I'd already left.@k@vS18/03/160300061. Silly me.``
Why are you lying like that... Mion?
There's no way you'd make such a careless mistake.
She might look rough around the edges, but I knew she was actually meticulous to the point of neurosis -- she never let anything slip.
changeReason: Original says 'rough appearance' suggesting only exterior; new translation adds 'actually meticulous to the point of neurosis,' reflecting Keiichi's deeper knowledge of Mion's true personality.

TextENGNew: Rattling off excuses when I hadn't even asked... was she trying to hide something?
Besides, Mion had been late to our meeting spot several times before.
So why would she go out of her way to apologize today of all days?
At first glance, a trivial, insignificant change.
A trivial occurrence. A trivial change.
A second gear...
``Huh?@k@vS18/03/160300063. Kei-chan, your eyes are all red.@k@vS18/03/160300064. Actually, they look totally bloodshot.``
``...O-oh, really?@k@vS18/01/160100206. There was a good late-night show on, so I ended up staying up...``
The lie came out reflexively.
I absolutely couldn't let Mion know about what Rena and I discussed at the garbage dump last night.
``On top of that, I found a manga I'd bought but never gotten around to reading. Stayed up till morning with it.``
``Wow~, an all-nighter then.@k@vS18/03/160300067. It must've been a really gripping story, huh?``
``Nah, not really.@k@vS18/01/160100209. Pretty run-of-the-mill stuff.@k@vS18/01/160100210. Nothing special.``
``Nothing special, huh~?``
Mion was pressing unusually hard.
It felt like a leading interrogation, as if she were waiting for me to trip up and reveal something.
Maybe I was just overreacting.
But the guilt of having to keep secrets from my friends weighed heavily on me right now.
My nerves were wound tight beyond reason, and I felt like I might snap and scream at the slightest provocation.
``Hey, um... about yesterday...``
``Huh...? What about yesterday?``
``There's something I need to tell you, Mion...``
``What's with you today?@k@vS18/03/160300071. Let's agree not to beat around the bush.@k@vS18/03/160300072. Out with it.``
In that moment, the words died in my throat.
I felt a stabbing pain in my back.
Rena was... watching.
Staring at me... with a piercing gaze.
``What I wanted to say is about yesterday...@k@vS18/01/160100214. I was way too harsh with you, Mion... and I'm sorry.``
``... It's fine, forget it.@k@vS18/03/160300074. I said some terrible things to you too, Kei-chan...``
``Besides... I'm the type who forgets everything after a good night's sleep.``
``...Ahahaha, that's so like you, Mion.``
Mion gave a playful shrug and flashed me a smile.
I felt the weight on my heart lift, if only a little.
``Hey, Kei-chan.@k@vS18/03/160300077. Was that... all you wanted to say to me?``
``You don't have... anything else to tell me?``
Had Mion sensed something after all...?
I froze on the spot, as if a spell had been cast on me.
Mion's feet closing the distance one step at a time seemed to play out in slow motion.
``Hey, Kei-chan.@k@vS18/03/160300080. We're friends, right?@k@vS18/03/160300081. No secrets between us. That's how it should be, isn't it?``
*Gulp.*
The sound of me swallowing echoed with startling clarity.
Someone tapped my shoulder without warning, and a short yelp escaped me.
Rena stood there with her head slightly tilted, regarding me with a curious look.
Rena casually averted her gaze from me and started giggling as she turned to look at Mion.
``...What are you laughing at, Rena?``
Mion asked with an irritated expression.
``Because, because~.@k@vS18/02/160200069. Mii-chan, your eyes are all red too.@k@vS18/02/160200070. Did you stay up late too? Is that it? Is it?``
With that one remark, the taut thread of tension snapped.
Mion let out a huge yawn, then broke into laughter.
``That's right.@k@vS18/03/160300086. We had our annual planning meeting last night.@k@vS18/03/160300087. I'm wiped out.``
``The Watanagashi planning meeting?``
``They call it a planning meeting, but it's really just a banquet.@k@vS18/03/160300089. The town council folks get together and party till dawn.@k@vS18/03/160300090. I got dragged along again.``
``Don't tell me you were drinking too?@k@vS18/01/160100221. You're underage~!``
``As if!@k@vS18/03/160300093. You're nagging me like an old busybody.@k@vS18/03/160300094. Give it a rest, Kei-chan.``
Swept along by Mion's boisterous laughter, before I knew it, I was laughing out loud too.
Rena and Rika-chan joined in, laughing together happily.
The same ordinary, everyday routine as always.
But for me right now, this cotton-candy-sweet, fluffy normalcy was what felt unreal...
What felt viscerally real -- what sharpened all five of my senses with its rough, gritty texture -- was what had happened last night.
Those two eyes. The dried blood caked on my fingers. The garbage heap with its ominous shadows. The sealed little room in hushed secrecy.
changeReason: Original describes 'Spilling fresh blood' and 'Following disturbing shadows'; new translation renders こびり付いた鮮血 as 'dried blood caked on my fingers' and restructures the imagery significantly.

TextENGNew: ``If there was a planning meeting, then Mii-chan... you pulled an all-nighter last night, didn't you?``
``You always say that cleanup drags on until morning every year.@k@vS18/02/160200073. Right? Right?``
Mion faltered at Rena's observation.
Her face visibly stiffened, and both her eyes took on a sharp edge.
But Rena didn't flinch in the slightest, gazing steadily down at Mion.
At first glance, a trivial, insignificant unease.
changeReason: Original translates 胸騒ぎ (chest unease/premonition) as 'disagreement'; new translation correctly renders it as 'unease.'

TextENGNew: A trivial occurrence. A trivial change. A trivial unease.
changeReason: Same correction as above: 胸騒ぎ translated as 'disagreement' in original, correctly rendered as 'unease' in new translation.

TextENGNew: Two gears meshed together and began spinning in reverse... at a speed no one could stop anymore...
And still, Rena's voice echoed in my ears like a refrain.
I'm going to kill Teppei... I'm going to kill Teppei... Kill... Kill...
Rena let out a huge yawn, then laughed.
``Actually, Rena stayed up late last night too.@k@vS18/02/160200075. We all match! Ahahahaha~!``
``Aahahahaha, what are the odds we'd all be in sync over something like that?``
``But, but, I'm happy we all match! Yay!``
Watching Rena bounce around with that innocent smile, I was replaying last night's events in my mind.
``That man, Teppei Houjou...@k@vS18/02/160200078. He's Rena's enemy too.``
changeReason: Original omits にとっても (for Rena too/also); new translation correctly includes 'too,' showing Rena shares this enmity.

TextENGNew: Rena nodded solemnly, then casually picked up a stuffed animal sitting inside the wagon.
It must have been very old. It was filthy and falling apart.
``Isn't this stuffed animal adorable?``
``Uh... w-well.@k@vS18/01/160100224. Not really something a guy would comment on, but... yeah, I think it's cute.``
``Right...@k@vS18/02/160200081. Then maybe Rena is the strange one? I wonder?``
Rena gently stroked the stuffed animal's head... then suddenly squeezed its neck with all her might!
*Squeeeze.*
The stuffed animal's face warped grotesquely as she crushed its neck.
``Ahahahaha...@k@vS18/02/160200083. Strange, right?@k@vS18/02/160200084. No matter how hard Rena tries, she just can't see this as cute...``
``Rena...?@k@vS18/01/160100226. If you squeeze that hard, you'll tear it apart.``
``Because...@k@vS18/02/160200086. That woman... gave me this stuffed animal!``
As she said that, Rena poured every ounce of strength into her grip.
*Plop*... *roll, roll, roll*...
The stuffed animal's head, torn clean off, rolled away across the floor.
Rena crushed the headless body in her palm with undisguised hatred.
``Trying to worm her way in with something like this -- that filthy woman! Despicable!!``
Rena hurled the remains aside,@k then vigorously wiped her palms on the hem of her skirt@k as though purging herself of defilement.
``Who is this woman...?``
``I don't even want to speak her name.@k@vS18/02/160200089. My mouth would twist just saying it.``
Rena's cold intensity left me breathless.
changeReason: Original says 'all I could do was keep breathing' implying continued breathing; new translation says 'left me breathless,' better capturing 息を飲む (to gasp/hold breath in shock).

TextENGNew: ``The truth is,@k@vS18/02/160200091. it's not just for Satoko-chan's sake.@k@vS18/02/160200092. Rena has her own reasons for wanting to kill Teppei.``
As she said that, Rena kept wiping her hands -- relentlessly, forcefully -- until it looked like her palms would scrape raw and red.
...Even in the dim light, a sharp, menacing gleam glinted in her eyes.
``And just when Dad was finally starting to look ahead again, when the two of us were about to start over from scratch...``
Rena bit her lip, then began to speak in halting fragments.
It was the story of her family -- one she had desperately hidden behind her smile.
The woman whose name Rena refused to even speak had apparently approached her father for his money, using every trick in the book to swindle him out of a considerable sum.
That woman was actually Teppei's partner, and the two of them had been conspiring together behind the scenes.
Rena had become aware of the truth, but by some twist of fate, the woman died a mysterious death just at that moment.
Thanks to that, the damage wasn't as catastrophic as feared, and Rena and her father were spared the worst-case scenario of being left destitute.
But the scars left on Rena's family ran deep, still casting dark shadows across her heart.
Spots of fresh blood began seeping into the hem of her skirt.
One small scratch appeared, then another, and another.
changeReason: Original says 'One small scratch grew and spread' (single scratch expanding); new translation correctly renders ひとつ、またひとつ as multiple scratches appearing sequentially.

TextENGNew: Yet Rena showed no sign of stopping...
How much difference was there, really?
Between a wound that gouges the heart and a wound that batters the body...
A visible wound heals with time.
But an invisible wound... may run so deep that it remains forever.
Even after long years have passed, some chance moment can suddenly remind you that the raw, red wound was open all along.

``Those people are vermin.@k@vS18/02/160200096. They barge into the field someone tended with all their heart, trample it underfoot, and pluck every beautiful flower to shreds.@k@vS18/02/160200097. And then they just leave.``
``And that's not all.@k@vS18/02/160200098. Before you know it, they worm their way in, acting like family.@k@vS18/02/160200099. They feed on your happiness, sucking it dry.``
``They're parasites!! How dare they! How dare they!! HOW DARE THEYYY!!``
*Scrub scrub scrub scrub...*
changeReason: Original renders ゴシゴシゴシゴシ as '*rub* *rub*' (2x); new translation renders it as '*Scrub scrub scrub scrub*' (4x), matching the four repetitions in the Japanese.

TextENGNew: ``If it were only Rena, it would have been bearable...@k@vS18/02/160200102. My suffering is the curse of Oyashiro-sama.@k@vS18/02/160200103. But Satoko-chan has nothing to do with that.``
Suddenly, Rena's hands went still.
``That's right... that's what it was...@k@vS18/02/160200108. I knew it all along...@k@vS18/02/160200109. It was always meant to be this way...``
``Rena saw it in a dream.@k@vS18/02/160200111. Eight hands...@k@vS18/02/160200112. They were the hands of someone exterminating vermin.``
changeReason: Original says 'legs of a spider'; new translation drops the spider metaphor entirely saying 'hands of someone.' The Japanese 蜘蛛の手 means 'spider's hands,' an important metaphor for coordinated action.

TextENGNew: ``Eight hands...?``
With a dreamy, vacant smile, Rena nodded.
Thinking back on it now, the true nature of the eight hands Rena spoke of that night...
Rena's own two hands, and the hands of two other people who would join the plan.
But then... whose were the remaining two...?
``The hands of Oyashiro-sama...``
Rena murmured, barely above a whisper.
*Rustle*... *Rustle*... *Crash!*
Something stirred in the darkness, making noise.
A cold sensation slithered along my spine.
I didn't have the courage to look behind me...
``...Keiichi-kun, it's time to say goodbye.@k@vS18/02/160200115. So... farewell--``
``...Don't say farewell.@k@vS18/01/160100232. Maybe I can't understand everything you've carried -- every scar, every worry.@k@vS18/01/160100233. But please, don't shut me out.``
``I can't say anything as cool as 'I'll protect you' or 'I'll support you.'@k@vS18/01/160100235. But at least let me be someone you can lean on when things get hard.``
``Thank you...@k@vS18/02/160200117. Hearing how you feel makes me really happy, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS18/02/160200118. But this is something Rena has to do alone.``
changeReason: Original includes 'after you murder someone, it's impossible to return to your ordinary life'; new translation renders the passage as 'this is something Rena has to do alone,' conveying a different aspect of Rena's reasoning.

TextENGNew: ``In order to obtain something, you have to give up something of equal... no, of greater value.@k@vS18/02/160200120. So, Rena needs to leave everyone behind in order to protect the things she holds dear.@k@vS18/02/160200121. ...And so, this is farewell, Keiichi-kun.``
changeReason: Original says 'Rena needs to leave everyone behind in order to protect them'; new translation says 'Rena has already made up her mind to sacrifice herself,' shifting the framing from departure to self-sacrifice.

TextENGNew: With eyes brimming with large tears, Rena turned to me and gave the bravest smile she could muster.
Then she spun around, threw the door open, and without a moment's hesitation, vanished into the darkness.
At that moment, buried alone amid the ruins of garbage, all I could do was watch Rena's back -- straight and resolute as she walked on.
And even now, a night later, I was still watching that retreating back...
After classes ended, Rena declined the invitation to club activities and was about to leave the classroom alone.
``Well then, Rena's heading home first.``
``See you tomorrow, Rena.``
``Be careful on the way home, Rena.``
``Yeah. Bye-bye, Mii-chan.@k@vS18/02/160200124. Bye-bye, Rika-chan.``
``Farewell, Keiichi-kun.``
Rena flashed me a bright smile and walked out of the classroom.
It wasn't too late.
If I reached out my hand, she was still within reach.
But I couldn't bring myself to reach out...
And as I hesitated, Rena's back grew smaller and smaller. Until... she vanished from my sight.
Were we going to keep on destroying things we could never fix with our own hands...?
After watching Rena leave, an overwhelming sense of emptiness hit me all at once.
changeReason: Original uses 'despondence' (emotional sadness); new translation uses 'overwhelming sense of emptiness,' more accurately capturing 虚脱感 (hollowness/enervation).

TextENGNew: I slumped down onto my desk and let my head hang.
The plan Rena had confided in me.
It was something that had been surfacing in my own mind, again and again.
No -- in my dreams, I had already acted on it.
The sensation I'd felt in those visions was impossible to forget, and something deep inside me craved more.
I want to kill him...
Once again, I confronted my honest feelings.
I'm going to kill Teppei... I'm going to kill Teppei... Kill... Kill...
Rena's words echoed in my ears, and in resonance, my heartbeat quickened.
I want to kill him... I want to kill him... Kill him... Kill him...
Kill, want to kill, kill, want to kill, kill, kill, want to kill, kill, want to kill, kill, kill, want to kill, kill, want to kill, kill...
``Kei-chan...?``
An unexpected voice snapped me back to reality.
I looked up to find Shion standing there, her face drawn and haggard.
...Without realizing it, quite a bit of time had slipped by.
Mion and Rika-chan... seemed to have already gone home.
``I don't know what to do anymore... I just don't know...``
Shion clutched at her hair, her face contorting in anguish.
``Shion... what happened...?@k@vS18/01/160100239. You came all the way here...``
Shion let out a deep sigh, then collapsed into the seat next to me as though her legs had given out.
``......Satoko did it again...``
``Did it again...?@k@vS18/01/160100241. What happened?``
``The Okinomiya child consultation center finally got moving...@k@vS18/06/160600136_2. But Satoko turned them away again...``
``Stubborn, obstinate...@k@vS18/06/160600141. I suppose you could call Satoko a girl with an incredibly strong will...``
``So... it's just going to be the same thing all over again?``
Shion nodded weakly.
``...And now, the backlash against Satoko will only escalate further...``
``That's... that's just...``
``Heh heh heh... heh heh heh heh... heh heh heh heh heh.@k@vS18/06/160600144. Ahahahaha... ahahahahahahaha~~~!!``
Shion laughed -- a bitter, self-mocking laugh.
By the end... it was mixed with tears.
``...I just want to kill him...!!``
changeReason: Original adds 'All the more reason' (justification); new translation directly renders 殺したい as 'I just want to kill him,' a raw expression of desire rather than logical reasoning.

TextENGNew: I want to kill him. Kill, kill, kill, KILL, KILL...!!
A cry of anguish, wrung from the very depths of Shion's heart.
Those words struck a powerful chord inside my chest.
That was it. ...In that moment, I finally understood -- the only option left before us was to 'kill.'
``...Are you willing to put your life on the line for Satoko?``
Shion stared at my face in stunned bewilderment.
``Answer me.@k@vS18/01/160100247. Depending on your answer, I'm prepared to tell you everything.``
Not understanding what I meant, Shion shook her head in small, rapid movements.
I poured everything I felt into my gaze as I looked back at her.
I would not look away. Not anymore.
So if you feel the same way I do, just nod. Silently.
She whispered in a small voice, then nodded with fierce resolve.
Gradually, Shion's expression regained its fire.
``...Of course.@k@vS18/06/160600150. Satoko is the precious little sister Satoshi-kun entrusted to me.``
We stared into each other's eyes, as if confirming each other's resolve.
And then, we nodded firmly together.
``All right.@k@vS18/01/160100249. Shion, come with me.``
I took Shion and headed for the garbage dump.
Thinking of Rena, sitting alone in her tiny secret sanctuary surrounded by the wreckage of refuse, my pace quickened.
The same path I had walked with Rena the night before.
But this time, I felt neither helplessness nor guilt.
I had sworn not to look away any longer.
There was only one thing I could see now.
Rena's slender back. Trembling in solitude, fighting against an enormous tide of fear.
Hold on, Rena.
I'll catch up to you soon.
You're not alone.
I'll stand right beside you.
Let's turn our backs on it all together. Society, morals, sin, punishment... every last thing.
changeReason: Original says 'Let's turn and face this together' (confronting); new translation says 'Let's turn our backs on it all together,' correctly rendering 背を向けよう (to turn one's back on).

TextENGNew: ``Why are we in a place like this...?@k@vS18/06/160600152. I'm... I'm actually scared...``
``Don't worry.@k@vS18/01/160100251. Trust me.``
Shion looked reluctant, but gave a quiet nod.
``It's fine.@k@vS18/01/160100253. I'm not exactly leading you to hell or anything.``
``I should hope not.@k@vS18/06/160600154. If you try anything funny, I'll snap your neck at mach speed and be home before dinner.``
``W-wait, hold on...?``
``Heh heh heh, that's just basic self-defense, you know?``
At last, a genuine smile broke across Shion's face.
It made me happy, and I smiled back.
Without either of us suggesting it, we took each other's hand.
I led Shion by the hand as we climbed the garbage heap.
Then we quietly approached the station wagon sitting in silence among the scrap.
``...Rena?@k@vS18/01/160100256. Are you there?``
From inside, the faint sense of someone holding their breath.
``Rena, you're in there, aren't you?``
Rena stayed hidden, making no move to respond.

``Rena, just stay where you are and listen.@k@vS18/01/160100259. I know you're principled, and since you already said farewell, you probably feel like you can't see Keiichi-kun ever again.@k@vS18/01/160100260. But that's just stubborn pride talking.``

``If you refuse and keep running, I'll follow you everywhere like a shadow.@k@vS18/01/160100263. I'll tag along on your treasure hunts, spy on all your secret 'kyute' moments... and then blab about them to everyone.``
changeReason: Original says 'I'll keep you locked away like a hidden treasure'; new translation says 'I'll tag along on your treasure hunts, spy on all your secret kyute moments,' completely changing the metaphor.

TextENGNew: ``...You wouldn't want that, would you?``
Faint sounds leaked from inside the wagon.
I could picture Rena desperately shaking her head, whispering 'no, no.'
``Let me see your face.@k@vS18/01/160100266. Rena...``
The wagon door slid open slowly.
And there was Rena, timidly peeking out with her head slightly bowed.
I rushed to her side.
``...Honestly, Keiichi-kun, you're so persistent...``
Rena was laughing as she said that, but the next instant she caught sight of Shion and her expression froze.
``...Why is Shii-chan here...?``
Wariness settled into Rena's eyes as she looked at Shion.
``Rena, about that matter--``
Before I could finish, Rena reached for the door.
*BANG!!*
Just barely in time.
I managed to stop the door from slamming shut, but at the cost of my right hand.
``Are you okay?! Keiichi-kun?!``
``Owwww...``
``Ooh... direct hit?!``
Shion offered that calm, perfectly timed observation.
``Who slams a door shut like that without warning...``
``I'm sorry, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS18/02/160200132. Rena didn't see your hand at all.@k@vS18/02/160200133. Does it hurt?``
Looking like she was on the verge of tears, Rena took my right hand in hers and began blowing on it gently.
``Pain, pain, go away.@k@vS18/02/160200135. Pain, pain, go away.``
``Heh... hahahaha!``
I couldn't help but burst out laughing.
``Keiichi-kun?@k@vS18/02/160200137. Did the pain make you go crazy? Did it?``
No, no.
It was just that Rena's reaction was so perfectly, innocently Rena... that I felt incredibly relieved.
I cleared my throat and faced Rena properly once more.
``Rena, listen.@k@vS18/01/160100273. I feel the same way you do.@k@vS18/01/160100274. And Shion does too.``
Rena shot a sideways glance at Shion.
Shion returned a bewildered look in my direction.
``About the plan you told me here last night.``
``--Let me be part of it.``
Rena's eyes flew wide, darting about in disbelief.
``No, actually, that's wrong.@k@vS18/01/160100278. You're the one who'll be helping me.@k@vS18/01/160100279. I'll be the one to do it.@k@vS18/01/160100280. I'll carry it out -- with my own hands.``
``What do you mean...?``
``With these hands of mine... I'm going to kill Teppei Houjou!``
``Keiichi-kun...``@r@t``K-Kei-chan?!``
Shion let out a sharp gasp. She stared at me with eyes wide in shock.
``What did you just... what did you mean by that...?``

``It's just as you heard, Shion.@k@vS18/01/160100283. I'm going to kill Teppei.@k@vS18/01/160100284. Everything I told you yesterday was true.@k@vS18/01/160100285. I'll fight to save Satoko.@k@vS18/01/160100286. I'll save Satoko, by whatever means necessary!``
changeReason: Original says 'Everything I told you yesterday was true. I'll fight to save Satoko'; new translation says 'Last night, Rena told me about her plan to do it herself,' attributing different information.

TextENGNew: ``But even so...``
``Can you name any other way to deal with Teppei?@k@vS18/01/160100288. ...There isn't one.@k@vS18/01/160100289. At this point, this is the only path left.``
``This is... this is...``
Shion's bowed shoulders began to tremble in small, rapid shudders.
She bit her lip... her brow furrowed deep...
``Heh heh heh... keh keh keh keh keh keh!!@k@vS18/06/160600163. AAAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA----!!``
Shion lifted her head and erupted into laughter, as though expelling everything from her body at once.
``This is, this is--!!@k@vS18/06/160600165. Wonderful!! Absolutely wonderful!!@k@vS18/06/160600166. This is exactly what I wanted to hear!!``
``Ehehehehe... heh heh heh... Rena's happy too!!@k@vS18/02/160200143. Rena loves it when we all match~!!!@k@vS18/02/160200144. Same feelings! Same thoughts!``
changeReason: Original has Rena say 'I feel that same love!!!'; new translation says 'Rena loves it when we all match~!!! Same feelings! Same thoughts!' -- different emotional framing.

TextENGNew: Their wild laughter ricocheted off the walls of garbage, echoing back as a chorus.
An orchestra of hatred.
A trio of murderous intent.
I surrendered myself to that beautiful melody.
``Rena, Kei-chan.@k@vS18/06/160600170. Of course I'll cooperate!``
``I know how you feel, Shion.@k@vS18/01/160100293. But this is the ultimate choice.@k@vS18/01/160100294. Don't rush. Think it through carefully.``
``Hmph!``
Shion flashed a fearless grin, planted her feet firmly, and strode toward us.
``Shii-chan...``
``Well?@k@vS18/06/160600173. Are you going to let me in on your plan or not?``
Rena looked to me.
``We're fighting to defend our future.@k@vS18/01/160100296. Not just for Satoko.@k@vS18/01/160100297. Rena, I'll defend your happiness too.``
changeReason: Original specifically addresses Rena: 'I'll defend your happiness too'; new translation generalizes to 'For all of us,' losing the personal moment between Keiichi and Rena.

TextENGNew: ``If you believe in me, then lend me your strength.@k@vS18/01/160100299. Don't give up on your future... seize it with your own hands.``
Rena smiled and nodded at me, then took Shion's hand and placed it atop their joined hands.
Three hands, layered one upon another.
We nodded to each other in silence.
And as one, we flung our hands toward the sky.
``Thank you, Keiichi-kun.``
``You're taking back that 'farewell,' right, Rena?``
``Yeah!``
With a powerful nod, Rena squeezed my right hand tight.
``Sorry! Did that hurt, Keiichi-kun?``
``It'll take more than that to kill him.``
``Pain, pain, go away.@k@vS18/02/160200151. Pain, pain...``
As if lending her voice to Rena's incantation, Shion began to murmur along.
````PAIN, PAIN, go away.@k@vS18/02/160200153|S18/06/160600177. PAIN, PAIN, go away.````
Before we knew it, all three voices had merged into one.

changeReason: Original includes additional chant lines 'Teppei Houjou's pain, go away. Go somewhere else...'; new translation abbreviates to repeated 'PAIN, PAIN, go away,' changing the incantation's specificity.

TextENGNew: Inside our hidden refuge, known to no one else,
we swore our sinful resolve to one another in silence.
We clasped each other's hands and looked into each other's eyes.
With a deep, shared nod, we hurled our challenge at the future -- our future.
The setting sun poured its light over the garbage heap as if to enfold it.
The entire landscape transformed -- from orange to vermilion, then to a deep, burning crimson.
Like a portent of the terrible, blood-soaked world to come.
As if to stain our baseless sense of omnipotence an ever more lurid hue... everything was painted over in red, red, red.
